NVIDIA (NVDA) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
Traders bet Nvidia's stock will return to record highs soon

summary: NVDA hit new 52-week and all-time high on April 27, closing at $216.61 (+4% on the day) on April 28. Blackwell GPU architecture shipping at scale since late 2025 is primary growth driver. Revenue +65% YoY, net income +64.7%. Forward PE ~25. 94% of analysts covering stock have Buy rating. Consensus PT of $260 implies ~30% upside. NAB Show 2026 product updates on April 15 for creative/video workflows.
